query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `inquiries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `inquiry_number` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `supplier_id` int,
  `supplier_name` varchar(255),
  `supplier_contact` varchar(255),
  `supplier_email` varchar(320),
  `project_id` int,
  `status` enum('draft','sent','answered','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `subject` varchar(512),
  `intro_text` text,
  `outro_text` text,
  `desired_delivery_date` varchar(64),
  `payment_terms` varchar(255),
  `delivery_terms` varchar(255),
  `notes` text,
  `sent_at` timestamp NULL,
  `answered_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `inquiries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `inquiry_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL,
  `position` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `article_id` int,
  `description` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `long_description` text,
  `quantity` decimal(12,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000',
  `unit` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Stk.',
  `remark` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `inquiry_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `company_settings` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `inquiry_prefix` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'ANF';
ALTER TABLE `company_settings` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `inquiry_start_number` int DEFAULT 1;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `inquiry_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
